meaning: Papua New Ginuea,新几内亚岛;Persona Non Grata,不得人缘的人;Portable Network Graphics,便携式网络图形
examples: You need an image of format PNG (16 X 16).
Barely-explored, PNG is set in the South Pacific Ocean, east of Indonesia and north of Australia.
The opening game, on 25 October, sees Morley return to Townsville for a fixture against PNG.
